name: OPQ32r
description: The OPQ32r is SHL's flagship personality questionnaire measuring 32 personality characteristics relevant to workplace behavior. It uses a forced-choice format to assess how individuals prefer to behave at work across dimensions like relationships with people, thinking style, feelings/emotions, and energy/drive. Widely used for selection and development across all levels.

name: MQ (Motivation Questionnaire)
description: The Motivational Questionnaire (MQ) measures 18 motivational dimensions to understand what energizes and drives individuals at work. It identifies what conditions increase or decrease a person's motivation and engagement, making it valuable for role fit, retention, and career development decisions.

name: Verify - Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to interpret and work with numerical data, tables, and graphs in business contexts. Candidates answer questions based on numerical information presented in charts, tables, and graphs. Available in multiple languages. Used for roles requiring data analysis, financial reasoning, and quantitative decision-making.

name: Verify - Verbal Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to evaluate written information and understand the logical implications of written material. Candidates read passages and determine whether statements are true, false, or cannot be determined. Widely used for roles requiring strong communication, reading comprehension, and written reasoning.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures logical and deductive thinking by presenting syllogisms and logical arguments. Candidates must determine conclusions that logically follow from a set of premises. Important for analytical roles, consultants, lawyers, and roles requiring structured thinking.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to identify patterns and rules within abstract visual information. Candidates identify the rules governing a sequence of figures and predict what comes next. Relevant for roles requiring problem-solving, learning agility, and the ability to work with novel information.

name: Verify G+
description: Measures general cognitive ability (g factor) combining numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning. Provides a single score representing overall mental ability and learning potential. Highly predictive of job performance across many roles and industries.

name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Mobile-first, gamified version of the numerical reasoning test. Uses interactive, scenario-based questions with engaging interfaces that work on both desktop and mobile. Maintains the same psychometric rigor as Verify Numerical Reasoning with improved candidate experience.

name: Verify Interactive - Deductive Reasoning
description: Mobile-first interactive version of deductive reasoning. Uses scenario-based formats with visual interfaces to assess logical thinking. Provides the same psychometric validity as the classic Verify Deductive Reasoning with a more engaging candidate experience.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that assesses knowledge of Java 8 programming including object-oriented principles, collections, streams, lambdas, exception handling, and core APIs. Designed for software developers and engineers working with Java.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Advanced-level test assessing deep knowledge of core Java concepts including concurrency, design patterns, JVM internals, generics, and advanced OOP. Suitable for senior Java developers.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Python programming including syntax, data structures, functions, OOP, modules, file handling, and standard libraries. Suitable for Python developers and data engineers.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests knowledge of JavaScript including ES6+ features, DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, closures, prototypes, and common frameworks concepts. For front-end and full-stack developers.

name: SQL (New)
description: Measures knowledge of SQL including SELECT statements, joins, subqueries, aggregations, indexes, and database design. For database developers, analysts, and data engineers.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the software testing life cycle, testing tools and techniques, design of test cases and generation of test reports.

name: Automata - Fix (Java)
description: Coding simulation where candidates debug and fix Java code. Assesses practical Java programming ability in a realistic IDE-like environment. Measures ability to identify and resolve bugs, understand code logic, and apply Java best practices.

name: Automata - Fix (Python)
description: Coding simulation where candidates debug and fix Python code. Tests practical Python programming skills in a realistic environment, measuring ability to identify bugs, understand code logic, and apply Python conventions.

name: Automata - Fix (JavaScript)
description: JavaScript coding simulation requiring candidates to identify and fix bugs. Assesses practical JavaScript/Node.js skills in a realistic environment.

name: Automata Pro
description: Advanced coding simulation platform that presents real-world software development tasks. Candidates write code from scratch or complete existing code, assessing full-stack problem solving, algorithm design, and code quality. Supports multiple programming languages.

name: Technology Professional 8.0 Solution
description: Pre-packaged assessment solution for technology professional roles combining cognitive ability, personality, and skills tests. Designed for software engineers, IT analysts, and technology consultants.

name: SHL Coding Interview
description: Live or asynchronous coding interview platform that enables technical evaluation of software developers. Supports multiple programming languages and includes an integrated IDE, test runner, and output evaluation.

name: General Mental Ability (GMAB)
description: Measures general cognitive ability through numerical, verbal, and abstract reasoning. A shorter test suitable for volume hiring, entry-level, and high-applicant-volume scenarios.

name: SJT - Customer Service
description: Situational judgement test presenting realistic customer service scenarios. Candidates choose the most and least effective responses. Measures customer orientation, problem-solving, and interpersonal skills relevant to service roles.

name: Call Center Simulation
description: Realistic simulation of call center tasks including handling customer calls, data entry, and multi-tasking. Assesses candidates on communication, speed, accuracy, and customer handling relevant to call center and BPO roles.

name: Numerical Reasoning - Verify Interactive
description: Interactive, mobile-optimized numerical reasoning test with scenario-based questions. Provides a more engaging candidate experience while maintaining scientific rigor.

name: Mechanical Comprehension Test
description: Assesses understanding of mechanical and physical principles such as levers, pulleys, gears, and basic physics. Used for roles requiring mechanical knowledge such as engineering, manufacturing, and maintenance.

name: Workplace English Test
description: Assesses English language proficiency in a workplace context. Tests reading, writing, listening, and grammar skills relevant to professional communication. Used for customer-facing roles and global organizations.

name: Smart Interview Live
description: AI-powered live video interview platform with structured interview guides, competency-based question banks, and AI scoring assistance. Enables consistent and fair interviews at scale.

name: Smart Interview On Demand
description: Asynchronous video interview solution where candidates record responses to pre-set questions. Allows recruiters to review responses at their own pace. Includes AI-assisted scoring for communication skills and relevant competencies.

name: OPQ32 (Workforce Edition)
description: Personality questionnaire assessing 32 work-related personality traits. Suited for broad workforce populations including operational and administrative roles. Measures communication style, leadership potential, thinking style, and interpersonal behavior.

name: Verify - Calculation
description: Measures the ability to perform straightforward numerical calculations including percentages, fractions, and basic arithmetic. Used for clerical and administrative roles where accuracy in routine calculations is essential.

name: Verbal Reasoning (VRBX)
description: A shorter, modernised verbal reasoning test for volume hiring. Assesses understanding of written information and making logical conclusions. Suitable for high-volume screening.

name: Numerical Reasoning (NUMX)
description: Shortened numerical reasoning test designed for volume screening. Measures ability to work with numerical data efficiently. Suitable for high-applicant-volume roles.

name: Remote Work Questionnaire (RWQ)
description: Assesses an individual's suitability and preferences for remote working. Measures self-discipline, communication in virtual environments, motivation to work from home, and adaptability. Relevant for hybrid and fully-remote roles.

name: Graduate 8.0 Solution
description: Comprehensive assessment solution for graduate-level hiring combining cognitive and personality tests. Includes numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning plus personality measurement to identify high-potential graduates.

name: Manager 8.0 Solution
description: Pre-packaged assessment battery for managerial role selection. Combines cognitive ability tests with OPQ personality assessment to predict managerial effectiveness, leadership capability, and stakeholder management.

name: Sales Manager 8.0 Solution
description: Assessment battery designed for sales management roles. Measures cognitive ability, sales personality traits, and behavioral competencies critical to leading sales teams and driving revenue.

name: Sales Representative 8.0 Solution
description: Pre-packaged solution for individual sales contributor roles. Combines situational judgement, personality, and cognitive tests to identify candidates with the sales drive, persuasion skills, and customer orientation needed for sales success.

name: Customer Service Solution
description: Tailored assessment solution for customer service roles. Includes SJT scenarios, personality, and cognitive screening to identify candidates with strong communication, empathy, problem-solving, and service orientation.

name: Hogan Personality Inventory (HPI)
description: Measures normal, socially desirable personality characteristics that predict occupational success. Assesses seven primary scales including sociability, ambition, adjustment, and prudence. Well-suited for leadership and executive selection.

name: Universal Competency Report (UCR)
description: OPQ-based report that maps personality to 20 competencies in SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Graphically shows how an individual's behavior likely impacts each competency. Useful for development conversations and selection feedback.

name: 360 Degree Feedback
description: Multi-rater 360-degree feedback tool that collects ratings from managers, peers, and direct reports against the Universal Competency Framework. Provides rich developmental insight for leaders and managers.

name: Business Analyst Skills Test
description: Assesses core business analysis competencies including requirements gathering, process modeling, stakeholder management, and documentation. For business analyst and product owner roles.

name: Data Entry Speed and Accuracy
description: Measures speed and accuracy of data entry tasks. Candidates enter information from source documents or screen-based materials. Relevant for administrative, clerical, and data processing roles.

name: Attention to Detail Test
description: Measures the ability to accurately process and check detailed information. Candidates identify errors and inconsistencies in documents, tables, and data. Used for administrative, compliance, and accuracy-critical roles.

name: DevOps (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), infrastructure as code, monitoring, and cloud platforms. For DevOps engineers and site reliability engineers.

name: AWS (Amazon Web Services) Knowledge Test
description: Tests knowledge of AWS services, architecture, security, and best practices. Covers EC2, S3, Lambda, IAM, VPC, RDS, and cloud architecture patterns. For cloud engineers and architects.

name: Agile Software Development (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Agile methodologies including Scrum, Kanban, and SAFe. Covers sprint planning, retrospectives, user stories, backlog management, and Agile principles. For software teams and project managers.

name: Project Management (New)
description: Tests knowledge of project management principles, methodologies, and tools. Covers initiation, planning, execution, monitoring, and closing. Relevant for project managers and team leads across industries.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of financial accounting principles, standards, and practices. Covers balance sheets, income statements, GAAP, reconciliation, and financial reporting. For accountants, finance analysts, and controllers.

name: Spring (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Spring core, AOP, IOC container and transactions. Relevant for Java developers using the Spring framework.

name: .NET Framework 4.5 (New)
description: Tests knowledge of .NET Framework including C#, ASP.NET, ADO.NET, LINQ, and WCF. For .NET developers and software engineers building enterprise applications.

name: C++ (New)
description: Tests knowledge of C++ programming including memory management, pointers, OOP, STL, templates, and system programming concepts. For systems programmers, game developers, and embedded engineers.

name: Scala (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Scala programming including functional programming, collections, pattern matching, and Akka. For Scala and data engineering roles.

name: Android Development (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Android app development including Activity lifecycle, Fragments, Intents, Jetpack components, and Kotlin/Java for Android. For mobile developers.

name: iOS Development (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of iOS development using Swift, UIKit, SwiftUI, and core iOS frameworks. For iOS developers and mobile engineers.

name: React (New)
description: Tests knowledge of React.js including components, hooks, state management, React Router, and Redux. For front-end developers building modern web applications.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of machine learning algorithms, model evaluation, feature engineering, and frameworks like scikit-learn and TensorFlow. For data scientists and ML engineers.

name: Data Analysis (New)
description: Tests ability to analyze and interpret data using tools like Excel, SQL, and statistical methods. Covers data cleaning, visualization, and drawing insights. For data analysts and business intelligence roles.

name: Cybersecurity (New)
description: Measures knowledge of cybersecurity concepts including network security, encryption, vulnerabilities, incident response, and compliance frameworks. For security analysts and IT security professionals.

name: Salesforce (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Salesforce CRM platform including objects, relationships, Apex, Visualforce, SOQL, and automation tools. For Salesforce developers and administrators.

name: SAP (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of SAP ERP modules, ABAP programming, and SAP Fiori. Covers finance, logistics, and HR modules. For SAP consultants and functional analysts.

name: OPQ Management Report
description: An OPQ-based report providing in-depth analysis of personality in the context of managerial and leadership roles. Covers leading, deciding, supporting, interacting, thinking, adapting, and organizing competencies.

name: Bank Administrative Exam
description: Comprehensive exam assessing skills for banking and administrative roles including numerical reasoning, verbal reasoning, and knowledge of banking concepts. Designed for financial services entry-level hiring.

name: Contact Center Solution
description: Pre-packaged solution for contact center agent hiring. Combines simulation, SJT, and personality to identify candidates suited for high-volume customer interactions.

name: Entry Level Sales 7.1 Solution
description: Assessment solution for entry-level sales roles, combining situational judgement, personality, and cognitive ability to identify sales potential in candidates without prior experience.

name: Verify - Working with Information
description: Measures the ability to process information presented in different table formats. Candidates use information from tables to answer related questions. Relevant for administrative, analytical, and data roles.
